description_long: This is a dark, metallic bust sculpture of a bearded man with long, wavy hair, mounted on a rectangular pedestal. The facial features are highly detailed, with deep-set eyes, a prominent nose, and a flowing mustache and beard that extend down to the chest. The hair is sculpted with visible texture, giving a sense of movement and realism. The bust is cut off at the shoulders and sits atop a solid, block-like base that appears to be made of the same material. The surface has a matte, slightly weathered finish, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative elements on the pedestal, and the back of the bust is smoothly finished with naturalistic hair detail.
description: A dark metallic bust of a bearded man with long hair, mounted on a rectangular pedestal. The sculpture features detailed facial and hair textures with a matte, weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, beard, and chest of the bust, with the rectangular pedestal fully visible.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the wavy hair, prominent nose, and the depth of the beard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with textured hair and the smooth, unadorned back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side profile mirroring the left, showing the hair's flow and the bust's shoulder cut-off.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an urban plaza, park, or indoor gallery.
